get.description: Retrieves information about the resources in the boxes service (e.g. the number of inboxes, the number of inboxMessages)

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Types of information to be retrieved.

200.description: Information about the service and its resources

get.summary: get system information of the service

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the client

post.summary: create a box for the given id (in the payload)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User's InboxID which is equivalent to `recipientInboxId`

delete.summary: delete the box associated with the given id (userId)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User's InboxID

post.summary: Create new message to a given InboxID. This is invke when a message is posted in the outbox

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User's InboxID

ownerId.description: id of the owner of the inbox

201.description: New message was successfully added to the recipient's Inbox

get.summary: Get the list of messages from a given InboxID

put.summary: Update message's status to [READ, UNREAD, DELETED]. This will update the recipientId status to the same status in the outbox message identified a the parentMessageId

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User's InboxId

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The unique record ID of the message

requestBody.description: Update to be made to the inbox message The status is the only part that can be updated.

delete.summary: Delete a message with the give messageId from the given inbox. This will update the recipientId status to DELETED in the outbox message identified a the parentMessageId

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User's InboxID which is equivalent to `recipientInboxId` or `userId`

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The unique record Id of the message

parameters.name: noUpdate
parameters.description: Used by system call, not to send an update to the outbox

parameters.name: ownerId
parameters.description: id of the owner of the inbox

post.summary: create an box for the given id (in the payload)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User's OutboxID

delete.summary: delete the box associated with the given id (userId)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User's OutboxId

post.summary: Create new message to a given OutboxID. This will post a message in each of the inboxes associated with the recipientIds

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User's OutboxId

201.description: New message was successfully added to the user's Outbox

get.summary: Get the list of messages from a given OutboxID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User's OutboxID

delete.summary: Delete a message with the given messageId from the given outbox

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User's OutboxID

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The unique record ID of the message

put.summary: Update a message with the given messageId from the given outbox. This is invoked when the inbox message status is updated by one of the recipient

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User's OutboxID

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The unique record ID of the message

requestBody.description: Update to be made to the outbox message. The status of a specific recipientId can be updated.

put.summary: System endPoint to update the socket session by sending a message

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: id of the session associated wit a specific socket

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the box to which the web socket is related

delete.summary: delete the box associated with the given id (userId)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: UserId

scopes.update:session: update a session for web socket

sessionId.description: id of the session in the client

href.description: url allowing to access the session for that client

id.description: id to be given to the box

description.example: this is the box of joe

ownerId.description: id of the owner of the box

message.description: Actual message; currently has no size limit
message.example: This is a message from Joe

referenceId.description: Optional id used by the application to correlate message. The reference is propagated from message to messages

parentMessageUrl.description: url of the original message where the message is a response of.

replyToMessageUrl.description: optional reference to indicate that the message is a reply of another message

recipientsInbox.description: Array of items pertaining to the InboxIds of the intended receivers of the message. There must be a least 1 item.

boxId.description: id of the box the message belongs to

recipientsInbox.description: Array of items pertaining to the InboxIds of the intended receivers of the message.

recipientId.description: id of the recipient which status need to be updated

ownerId.description: id of the owner of the outbox
